title: Perfection Fresh Australia Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: The ACCC commenced Federal Court civil proceedings against Perfection Fresh Australia (Australia's second-largest fresh vegetable supplier) alongside three other suppliers and three senior executives, alleging price fixing on 84 occasions in the supply of fresh produce (including broccoli, cauliflower, iceberg lettuce, cucumber, Brussels sprouts and zucchini) to ALDI stores in NSW, Victoria and Queensland between 2018 and 2024.
scope: Subject of Federal Court civil cartel proceedings instituted by the ACCC, alleging price fixing on 84 occasions; Alleged conduct concerns supply of fresh produce to ALDI across three states between 2018 and 2024; Proceedings are ongoing; allegations not yet determined by the court
